Subtree.description: Executes a behavior tree (.bt) as a single behavior and returns the status of the subtree.

options.description: Select a subtree.
Enter optional information to return an object that will be this tree's notepad.
Enter optional code that will be called with the subtree's results with the subtree is done.

SubtreeJs.description: Dynamically executes a behavior tree (.bt) as a single behavior. This behavior returns the status of the subtree.

options.description: Passes in a subtree module to the callback.
Enter optional information to return an object that will be this tree's notepad.
Enter optional code that will be called with the subtree's results with the subtree is done.

PlayAnimation.description: Plays an animation. Succeeds when the animation is finished.

options.description: Select the animation file to play.
True for uploading to the GPU immediately.
True for prevent flow start until this animation is loaded.
Enter optional code to modify the animation's playback.

type.label: Provide animation file path via function

options.description: Enter a function returning the animation file path to play (relative to project's 'animations' folder).
True for uploading to the GPU immediately.
Enter optional code to modify the animation's playback.
Select the name of the animation to play.
Enter function to return 'CloneOptions' that modify the animation's creation.
Enter function to return options that modify the animation's playback.
Enter a function returning the animation name to play.
Enter function to return options that modify the animation's creation.
Enter function to return options that modify the animation's playback.
Enter function to return the animDB query parameters.
Enter function to return the particular result from amongst all that matched the query.
Enter function to return 'CloneOptions' that modify the animation's creation.
Enter function to return options that modify the animation's playback.
Indicate the source of the animation (filepath, function returning a filepath, AnimDB name or AnimDB query).

PlayAudio.description: Plays a single audio source. The audio format is any format supported by HTML5 audio. Succeeds when the audio file is finished playing

options.description: Enter the audio file path.
True for caching the audio. False for single-play and destroy.

LookAt.description: Creates body and eye animations for looking at a point in 3D space

options.description: Return the x, y, and z coordinates Jibo should look at.
True for continuous mode look at. False for single-shot look at.
Enter optional code to modify the lookAt behavior.

Blink.description: Animates Jibo's eye to blink once.

options.description: Enter text for Jibo to say. Takes plain text or SSML markup.
Enter optional code to execute each time Jibo says a single word.

TextToSpeechJs.description: Dynamically creates speech output for Jibo.

options.description: Return what you want Jibo to say.
Enter optional code to execute each time Jibo says a single word.

StartOnAnimEvent.description: Prevents the behavior it's decorating from starting until a specified event is received from an animation.

options.description: Specify the event name (set on the animation's Event Layer) on which the animation should start.
Enter optional code to execute after the event is received but before the behavior starts.

StartOnEvent.description: Prevents behavior it's decorating from starting until specified event is received from the global emitter.

options.description: Specify the event name you want to listen for the component to start.
This function is called after the event was received but before the component starts.

SucceedOnEvent.description: Forces the behavior it's decorating to succeed when an event is received from the global emitter.

options.description: Specify the event name you want to listen for the component to succeed.
This function is called after the event was received along with any payload.

SucceedOnEmbedded.description: Succeeds a behavior upon hearing a built-in listening rule.

options.description: Specify the name of the embedded rule you want to listen for (hey_jibo).
(listener), event emitter for hey-jibo (asr, spkr) and error events.

ListenEmbedded.description: Listens only for an embedded rule (hey_jibo)

options.description: Specify the name of the embedded rule you want to listen for (hey_jibo).
(listener), event emitter for hey-jibo (asr, spkr) and error events.

Listen.description: Tells Jibo to listen for auditory input using Natural Language Understanding (NLU).

options.description: Set the dictionary of options that will be returned for the listening task.
Specify the file path for the rule to use to parse Listen results.
Enter code to execute when Jibo has heard input. (listener), event emitter for hey-jibo (asr, spkr) and timeout() events.

SucceedOnListen.description: Succeeds a behavior upon hearing a custom Natural Language Understand (NLU) rule.

options.description: Set the dictionary of options that will be returned for the listening task.
Specify the file path for the rule to use to parse Listen results.
Enter code to execute when Jibo has heard input. (listener), event emitter for hey-jibo (asr, spkr) and timeout() events.

ListenJs.description: Tells Jibo to listen for auditory input using Natural Language Understanding (NLU).

options.description: Set the dictionary of options that will be returned for the listening task.
Pass a custom listening rule into the callback.
Enter code to execute when Jibo has heard input. (listener), event emitter for cloud (asr, spkr), hey-jibo (asr, spkr), timeout (), incremental (asr, stop()), and end-of-speech() results.

SucceedOnListenJs.description: Succeeds a behavior upon hearing a custom Natural Language Understand (NLU) rule.

options.description: Set the dictionary of options that will be returned for the listening task.
Pass a custom listening rule into the callback.
Enter code to execute when Jibo has heard input. (listener), event emitter for cloud (asr, spkr), hey-jibo (asr, spkr), timeout (), incremental (asr, stop()), and end-of-speech() results.

TakePhoto.description: Attempts to take a photo and return the image url in the onPhoto callback

options.description: Specify the resolution of the photo you want to take.
Specify the which camera to use to take a photo
Set optional code to execute after the photo is taken. If successful, returns imageUrl; otherwise, returns error.
True to remove camera distortion from the photo. False to keep camera distortion on the photo.

ReadBarcode.description: Attempts to read a barcode or QRcode and returns the barcode data

options.description: Enter the code that will be called when the barcode is read. If successful, returns barcode/QRcode data; otherwise, returns error.

Mim.description: A Multimodal Interaction Module, for all your speaking needs.

options.description: path to mim file (from project root)
Return variables for Mim prompt conditions and text replacement
MIM result - allows modification of an individual listen result before the MIM analyzes it
provides data on the end result of the MIM - a successful response.

Menu.description: A self contained single stage menu.

options.description: Provide the menu config data.
Called when the menu is closed by the user or a timeout.
Called when a user utterance matches the menu rule, or an item is selected
Called when a user tries to choose an item with positional selection - 'open the second one', etc
